mapper.select: SELECT scene_id AS sceneId, scene_name AS sceneName, wind_power AS windPower, coriolis_enabled AS coriolisEnabled, continent_layout AS continentLayout, particle_count AS particleCount, speed_coefficient AS speedCoefficient, description, create_time AS createTime FROM t_current_scene ORDER BY scene_id

SELECT scene_id AS sceneId, scene_name AS sceneName, wind_power AS windPower, coriolis_enabled AS coriolisEnabled, continent_layout AS continentLayout, particle_count AS particleCount, speed_coefficient AS speedCoefficient, description, create_time AS createTime FROM t_current_scene WHERE scene_id = #{sceneId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_current_scene (scene_name, wind_power, coriolis_enabled, continent_layout, particle_count, speed_coefficient, description) VALUES (#{sceneName}, #{windPower}, #{coriolisEnabled}, #{continentLayout}, #{particleCount}, #{speedCoefficient}, #{description})
